leadText: The Ice Heal (Japanese: こおりなおし Ice Heal) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It can be used to thaw a frozen Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon from freezing .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Thaws out a Pok é mon that has been frozen solid. G S C Defrosts frozen Pok é mon . R S E Colo XD Defrosts a frozen Pok é mon . FR LG A spray-type medicine. It defrosts a frozen Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It defrosts a Pokémon that has been frozen solid. X Y OR AS S M US UM A spray-type medicine for freezing. It can be used once to defrost a Pokémon that has been frozen solid. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A spray-type medicine for treating freezing. It can be used to thaw out a single Pokémon that has been frozen solid. S V ZA A spray-type medicine for treating freezing. It can be used to thaw out a Pokémon that has been frozen solid.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Cures freezing.

Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Ice Heal appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 4 points to use.
